examples: The Himalayan kingdom of Bhutan has a longstanding policy of charging visitors a daily fee.
Tour operator Explore has been surprised to see an increase in last-minute bookings of high-priced trips to such places as India, Bhutan and Nepal.
Bhutan has yet to win an Olympic medal.
That would be remarkable for any nation, but especially for one so closely equated with happiness as Bhutan.
There is another world inside this beautiful Himalaya which is the sad part of Bhutan.
